change_filament_gcode:
{if previous_extruder != next_extruder}
{if max_layer_z < 12}
G1 Z15 F1200
{else}
G1 Z{max_layer_z + 3.0} F1200
{endif}
TOOL_CHANGE_START F=[previous_extruder] T=[next_extruder]
DISABLE_ALL_SENSOR

G1 E-5 F{old_filament_e_feedrate}
CUT_FILAMENT T=[previous_extruder]
MOVE_TO_TRASH
M400

{if nozzle_temperature_range_high[previous_extruder] >= nozzle_temperature_range_high[next_extruder]}
M104 S{nozzle_temperature_range_high[previous_extruder]}
{else}
M104 S{nozzle_temperature_range_high[next_extruder]}
{endif}

M106 S0
M106 P2 S0
UNLOAD_T[previous_extruder]
G92 E0
M83
G1 E2 F50
T[next_extruder]

{if nozzle_temperature_range_high[previous_extruder] >= nozzle_temperature_range_high[next_extruder]}
SET_HEATER_TEMPERATURE HEATER=extruder TARGET={nozzle_temperature_range_high[previous_extruder]} WAIT=1
{else}
SET_HEATER_TEMPERATURE HEATER=extruder TARGET={nozzle_temperature_range_high[next_extruder]} WAIT=1
{endif}

M400
M106 S60

; purge pass 1
G1 E1 F50
G1 E37.99 F{old_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E1.31 F50
G1 E11.79 F{old_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E1.31 F50
G1 E11.79 F{old_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E1.31 F50
G1 E-[new_retract_length_toolchange] F1800

; tip clean between purge passes
M400
M106 S255
G91
G1 X-5 F60
G1 X5 F60
G90
CLEAR_FLUSH
M400
M106 S60

; purge pass 2, lighter cleanup pass
G1 E[new_retract_length_toolchange] F300
G1 E22.00 F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E0.75 F50
G1 E7.00 F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E0.75 F50
G1 E7.00 F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E0.75 F50
G1 E-[new_retract_length_toolchange] F1800

M104 S[new_filament_temp]
M400
M106 S255
G91
G1 X-5 F60
G1 X5 F60
G90
M109 S[new_filament_temp]
G92 E0
M400
CLEAR_FLUSH
CLEAR_OOZE
M400
M106 S0
TOOL_CHANGE_END
G1 Y305 F9000

DISABLE_FILAMENT_WIDTH_SENSOR
RESET_FILAMENT_WIDTH_SENSOR
SET_FILAMENT_SENSOR SENSOR=fila ENABLE=1
{endif}
layer_change_gcode:
{if timelapse_type == 1} ; timelapse with wipe tower
G92 E0
G1 E-[retraction_length] F1800
G2 Z{layer_z + 0.4} I0.86 J0.86 P1 F20000 ; spiral lift a little
G1 Y304 F20000
G1 X95 F20000
G92 E0
M400
TIMELAPSE_TAKE_FRAME
G1 Y324 F5000
G1 E[retraction_length] F300
G1 X65 F5000
G1 Y290 F20000
{elsif timelapse_type == 0} ; timelapse without wipe tower
TIMELAPSE_TAKE_FRAME
{endif}
G92 E0
SET_PRINT_STATS_INFO CURRENT_LAYER={layer_num + 1}
machine_end_gcode:
G92 E0
G1 E-3 F1800
G0 Z{min(max_print_height, max_layer_z + 3)} F600
UNLOAD_FILAMENT T=[current_extruder]
G0 Y290 F12000
G0 X90 Y290 F12000
{if max_layer_z < max_print_height / 2}G1 Z{max_print_height / 2 + 10} F600{else}G1 Z{min(max_print_height, max_layer_z + 3)} F600{endif}
PRINT_END
machine_start_gcode:
INIT_MAPPING_VALUE
PRINT_START BED=[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] HOTEND=[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer] CHAMBER=[chamber_temperature] EXTRUDER=[initial_no_support_extruder]
SET_PRINT_STATS_INFO TOTAL_LAYER=[total_layer_count]
M83
G92 E0
G90
M140 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single]
M104 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer]
M141 S[chamber_temperature]
G4 P3000
T[initial_tool]
G92 E0

; adaptive purge line
; Orca-visible only, conservative lane selection
; safe for 305x305 printable area with these excluded regions:
; - front-right: X293..305 Y0..20
; - rear-left:   X0..35   Y302..305
; if no full edge is clear, skip purge line and start printing

{if first_layer_print_min[1] > 8}
    ; front lane
    ; safe because it stays well left of the front-right exclusion
    G1 Z0.28 F1200
    G1 X55 Y3 F12000
    G1 E0.8 F300
    G1 X235 E9.0 F900
{elsif first_layer_print_min[0] > 8}
    ; left lane
    ; safe because it stays away from the rear-left exclusion
    G1 Z0.28 F1200
    G1 X3 Y25 F12000
    G1 E0.8 F300
    G1 Y205 E9.0 F900
{elsif first_layer_print_max[1] < 297}
    ; rear lane
    ; safe because it starts right of the rear-left exclusion
    G1 Z0.28 F1200
    G1 X55 Y302 F12000
    G1 E0.8 F300
    G1 X235 E9.0 F900
{elsif first_layer_print_max[0] < 297}
    ; right lane
    ; safe because it starts above the front-right exclusion
    G1 Z0.28 F1200
    G1 X302 Y25 F12000
    G1 E0.8 F300
    G1 Y205 E9.0 F900
{else}
    ; no fully clear edge lane found
    ; skip purge line
{endif}

G92 E0
SET_PRINT_STATS_INFO CURRENT_LAYER=1
name: Qidi X-Plus 4 0.4 nozzle - dillacorn WITH AMS
printer_settings_id: Qidi X-Plus 4 0.4 nozzle - dillacorn WITH AMS
time_lapse_gcode:
{if timelapse_type == 1} ; timelapse with wipe tower
G92 E0
G1 E-[retraction_length] F1800
G2 Z{layer_z + 0.4} I0.86 J0.86 P1 F20000 ; spiral lift a little
G1 Y304 F20000
G1 X95 F20000
G92 E0
M400
TIMELAPSE_TAKE_FRAME
G1 Y324 F5000
G1 E[retraction_length] F300
G1 X65 F5000
G1 Y290 F20000
{elsif timelapse_type == 0} ; timelapse without wipe tower
TIMELAPSE_TAKE_FRAME
{endif}
